title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Deleting devices
scenario: Deleting a device from the device list correctly removes it and preserves connected/disconnected state for remaining paired devices
steps: 1. Pair and connect at least 3 Bluetooth audio devices to the phone via the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app to the Home screen showing the device list.
3. Power off 2 of the 3 connected devices.
4. On the Home screen, locate the device list and delete one of the devices (e.g., tap the device → Device Settings → Remove Device or use the delete/remove option).
5. Observe the device list after deletion.
6. Attempt to delete each of the remaining devices from the device list one by one.
expected: The deleted device is properly removed from the device list. The remaining devices are still displayed with correct connected/disconnected state (e.g., the powered-off devices show as disconnected, the still-powered device shows as connected). All remaining devices can be successfully deleted from the list.
